files.purpose: home route; renders Hero, CategoryLinks, ProductGrid, ValueProps, FeatureSplit, TrustSection, ContactCTA
about route; renders AboutHero, StatsBlock, StoryContent, ContactCTA
menu route; renders MenuHero, ProductGrid, ContactCTA
sticky top navigation with brand logo, links, and mobile menu
global footer with brand logo, links, and newsletter signup
hero section with brand headline, subtitle, primary CTA, and asymmetrical image mask
horizontal row of circular category links for target audiences
grid of best-selling vegetarian bowls with warm cream backgrounds
grid of key benefits with thin-stroke icons and 1px borders
alternating flex block for delivery, outlets, and pop-ups info
exports all copy, product data, testimonials, and navigation links
